Ready to move in, this north-east facing home is vaastu compliant, ensuring a serene and positive atmosphere. Spacious and thoughtfully designed, it offers ample room for families to thrive. Property Specifications This exquisite semi furnished apartment, boasting a super area of 1,600 sq. ft., is situated on the 7th floor of an 8-story building, offering stunning views and a spacious living environment. The apartment features four well-appointed bedrooms, each with an attached western-style bathroom equipped with a geyser, ensuring comfort and convenience for every resident. Three balconies attached to the bedrooms provide a serene garden view, perfect for relaxing moments and enjoying fresh air. The separate living and dining areas are designed to cater to both everyday living and entertaining, providing ample space for family gatherings and social events. The modular kitchen, complete with a chimney and a piped gas connection, is both functional and stylish, making cooking a delightful experience. A utility area attached to the kitchen adds practicality to your daily chores, while the vitrified flooring throughout the apartment enhances its modern appeal.Facilities This property also comes with valuable amenities, including one covered and one open parking space, ensuring your vehicles are secure. Residents benefit from 24-hour water supply from the corporation, as well as 100 power backup for uninterrupted living. Security is a priority, with a dedicated security guard and CCTV installations providing peace of mind. The building is equipped with two lifts for easy access to all floors. Additionally, residents can enjoy communal amenities such as a banquet hall and community hall, perfect for hosting events and gatherings.Locality Located opposite MGS International School, this thriving locality offers a perfect blend of convenience and accessibility. With hospitals and mallssupermarkets situated within 1 km, residents can easily access essential services and shopping needs. Public transport is readily available, with buses and autos ensuring seamless connectivity throughout the area. Banks and ATMs are also nearby for financial convenience. The railway station is approximately 5 km away, while the metro station is just 3 km, enhancing the overall accessibility for commuters.

resultList.dtldesc: Discover an elegant and spacious 4 BHK apartment located in the premium residential enclave of Sector 128, Noida Expressway. Designed for discerning homeowners, this ready-to-move residence combines expansive living spaces, refined interiors, and world-class amenities within a well-planned and prestigious development.::::Property Specifications::This semi-furnished apartment offers a generous super built-up area of 3,905 sq. ft with a carpet area of approximately 2,538 sq. ft. Positioned on the 31st floor of a 34-storey tower, the home features four well-proportioned bedrooms, four bathrooms, and three balconies that allow ample natural light and ventilation. The apartment also includes a dedicated servant room, enhancing everyday convenience. North-west facing and finished with premium marble flooring, the residence provides scenic views overlooking the garden, swimming pool, and main road. The layout is thoughtfully designed to support comfortable family living with a balance of privacy and openness.::::Facilities::The project offers a host of luxury amenities including a grand entrance lobby, theme-based architecture, infinity swimming pool, golf course, bar and lounge, and a fully equipped health club with steam and jacuzzi facilities. Multiple high-speed lifts ensure smooth access across floors, while covered parking spaces are provided for residents. The development is professionally managed to deliver a refined and secure living environment.::::Locality::Situated in Sector 128 along the Noida Expressway, the apartment enjoys excellent connectivity to major business districts and urban hubs. Jaypee Hospital is located nearby, along with reputed educational institutions, retail centres, and daily convenience outlets. The well-developed infrastructure, green surroundings, and proximity to key destinations make this location highly desirable for luxury residential living in Noida.
